name: Organizacion Cultiba, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Organizaci√É¬≥n Cultiba, S.A.B. de C.V. produces, sells, and distributes carbonated and non-carbonated drinks in Mexico and internationally. It offers a portfolio of beverages, such as soft drinks, juices, iced tea, bottled water, and others. The company provides products under its own brands, as well as third-party brands. It also produces sugar; and generates electrical power through sugar cane mash. The company was formerly known as Grupo Embotelladoras Unidas S.A.B. de CV and changed its name to Organizaci√É¬≥n Cultiba, S.A.B. de C.V. in December 2012. Organizaci√É¬≥n Cultiba, S.A.B. de C.V. was founded in 1978 and is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
